layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the market — patience beats FOMO right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deep in 'Extreme Fear' territory with a score of 25/100, and Bitcoin dominance at 56.5% is crushing altcoins. While several coins have bounced sharply in the last few days (ETH +8%, LDO +27%, UB +35%), these look like relief bounces within larger downtrends rather than confirmed reversals. The candidates on our watchlist are either already extended from their bounces or still showing strongly bearish chart structures. Chasing a bounce here carries high risk of buying a dead cat bounce.
layman_action: Wait on the sidelines. Set price alerts for ETH around $1,840 and LDO around $0.33 — if they pull back to support with volume confirmation, those become much better entries. Don't chase coins that have already popped 15-30% in a week during a fearful market.
expert_reasoning: Every swing candidate presents problems. BONK has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows — a textbook avoid. NIGHT is in freefall (-38% weekly) with no bottom confirmation. LDO and UB have bullish chart patterns but have already run 27% and 35% respectively, making risk/reward unfavorable (LDO R/R is only 0.38x to resistance). ETH is the best quality play with RSI at 39 (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but it's already bounced 17% over 5 days and remains below all major MAs. The prudent move is to wait for a pullback to the $1,800 support zone identified in the chart analysis, which would offer a much better risk/reward setup. High BTC dominance (56.5%) continues to punish alts, and the Extreme Fear reading, while contrarian bullish long-term, hasn't shown a clear inflection point yet — it's been flat around 26 for the past week.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear has been flat (not improving) — could signal further downside ahead rather than a bottom
BTC dominance at 56.5% actively crushing altcoin performance — entering alts is swimming against the tide
Most bounce candidates have already moved 15-50% off lows — chasing here means poor risk/reward
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a hold and bounce there with rising volume is the ideal entry
Fear & Greed index — watch for a break above 30 as confirmation that sentiment is turning
LDO pullback toward $0.33-0.35 range — if it holds after this 50% 5-day spike, could be a strong continuation setup
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with BTC dominance elevated at 56.5%, creating a hostile environment for altcoins. BTC itself is recovering (+4.7% weekly) but alts are either still bleeding or experiencing sharp relief bounces that may not sustain.
context_banner: Relief bounces in a fearful market are traps more often than turning points — discipline and patience protect capital here.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 39 is approaching oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but the 17% 5-day bounce suggests the easy oversold money has already been captured.
Extreme Fear at 25 has been flat for a week (avg 26.3), showing no inflection — contrarian buy signal is not yet confirmed.
BONK shows Three Black Crows (-2.0 bias), NIGHT/ETH/MON all bearish (-0.7), only UB (+0.8) and LDO (+0.85) are bullish but both already extended.
ETH derivatives reset reported — could set up cleaner positioning for next leg, but needs price confirmation at support.
Bitcoin eyeing $70K rally per CoinTelegraph analysis — if BTC runs further, high dominance may continue suppressing alt setups.
